reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio.
Pero los baños públicos son para una persona a la vez.
Raro para un ACA en el centro de la ciudad de San Juan.
El menú que se muestra en los afiches de las vidrieras del comedor, en el Full, no está disponible.
Más raro aún

(Translated by Google)
Very good service.

But the public restrooms are for one person at a time. Strange for an ACA in downtown San Juan.
The menu displayed on the posters in the dining room windows, at the Full, is not available. Even stranger.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobV9fTERnEAE

reviews.comment:
Ayer me baje en esta estación a comprar agua y una galleta para mi bebé, el empleado me persiguio para decirme que sacara el auto del estacionamiento porque solo lo podía ocupar si consumía ahí...le dije que estaba comprando ahí, pero de todas formas continuo...el encargado del local no hizo más que defender al empleado y solo dijo que quizás se había expresado mal.....son de cuarta... obviamente no les compro nunca más nada y espero que los demás no lo hagan

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday I got off at this station to buy water and a cookie for my baby. The employee chased me down, telling me to move my car from the parking lot because I could only use it if I bought something there. I told him I was buying something there, but he kept going anyway. The store manager just defended the employee and said maybe he hadn't expressed himself well. They're awful. Obviously, I'm never buying anything from them again, and I hope no one else will either.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNod2QzWFdREAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre que vamos de vacaciones ,vamos a está YPF que es del acá ya que somos socios ,y es la única que tiene buena atención ,muy amable los chicos ,!!! La otra YPF del acá es muy mala la atencion

(Translated by Google)
Whenever we go on vacation, we go to this YPF station, which is local since we're members, and it's the only one with good service—the staff are very friendly! The other YPF station here has terrible service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoenRyZHVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tienen un solo operario en la playa, saturado, no da abasto con la cantidad de autos haciendo fila, muy mal servicio. No es culpa del operario, hace lo que puede.

(Translated by Google)
They only have one attendant on the beach, and he's overwhelmed. He can't keep up with the number of cars in line; the service is terrible. It's not the attendant's fault, though; he's doing the best he can.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCall2YkJBEAE
